notes: Bottom nav HOME tab fixed (collapsed to ~12px on 5-tab layout). XP-based leveling replaces SP-per-match: kills give XP, wins give a difficulty-scaled bonus, per-match cap blocks runaway grinding, each level grants 1 SP. SKILLS page shows HOW TO EARN SP banner with live level + XP bar + unspent SP.
launcher_notes: Hardened self-update flow on Windows. Manifest now served from pulsewavegame.com with 30s cache.
